message:
fix: report accurate surface suffix in dolt remote add/remove messages (bd-e6o2)

When CLI operations fail, success messages now show "(SQL only)" instead of
the misleading "(SQL + CLI)". The remove command also distinguishes
"(CLI only)" when only the CLI surface existed.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/opal
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
